## Editing.ValidationReport class

Implementation of IValidationReport. Immutable validation report with field and general errors.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class ValidationReport implements IValidationReport 
```
**Implements:** [IValidationReport](./ts-chocolate.editing.ivalidationreport.md)
